title: Don Quixote
subtitle: The Ingenious Gentleman of La Mancha
synopsis: A tale of an elderly man who becomes obsessed with books of chivalry and decides to become a knight-errant, adopting the name Don Quixote and embarking on a series of fantastical adventures across Spain.|In his delusional state, he mistakes windmills for giants and flocks of sheep for armies, accompanied by his loyal but practical squire Sancho Panza, who often tries to bring him back to reality while unwittingly getting swept up in the adventures.
content: In a village of La Mancha, whose name I do not wish to remember...

subtitle: A Vision of Totalitarian Future
synopsis: In a totalitarian future society, a man named Winston Smith works at the Ministry of Truth, where his job involves perpetuating propaganda and historical revisionism for the oppressive regime of Big Brother. Despite the constant surveillance and thought control, Winston begins to question the system and secretly rebels against it.|As Winston embarks on a forbidden romance with Julia, a fellow rebel, he becomes increasingly aware of the Party's manipulation of reality and human nature. Their attempt to join a resistance movement leads them into a dangerous game of survival, testing the limits of loyalty, betrayal, and the power of an authoritarian state to break the human spirit.
content: It was a bright cold day in April, and the clocks were striking thirteen...

title: Beloved
subtitle: A Ghost Story of Memory and Loss
synopsis: Sethe, an escaped slave living in post-Civil War Ohio, is haunted by the ghost of her baby daughter, whom she killed to prevent her from being taken back into slavery. The trauma of her past and the weight of her actions continue to shape her present life and relationships.|Years later, a mysterious young woman named Beloved appears at Sethe's doorstep, bearing an uncanny resemblance to her dead daughter. As Beloved's presence becomes increasingly dominant, Sethe must confront her haunting memories and find a way to reconcile with her past while protecting her fragile sense of freedom.
content: 124 was spiteful. Full of a baby's venom...

title: Never Let Me Go
subtitle: A Story of Love and Loss
synopsis: Set in a dystopian Britain, the story follows Kathy H. as she reminisces about her seemingly idyllic childhood at Hailsham boarding school, where she formed deep bonds with her friends Ruth and Tommy. As they grow up, they begin to understand that their sheltered existence holds a dark purpose.|The truth of their predetermined fate slowly unfolds as they discover why they were created and what society expects of them. Through Kathy's gentle narration, the novel explores themes of memory, friendship, and what it means to be human in a world that sees them as something less.
content: My name is Kathy H. I'm thirty-one years old, and I've been a carer now for over eleven years...

title: The Handmaid's Tale
subtitle: A Story of Dystopian Patriarchy
synopsis: In a totalitarian society called Gilead, women are stripped of their rights and categorized into distinct social classes. Offred, a Handmaid, is forced into sexual servitude as part of a system designed to repopulate a world devastated by environmental disasters and declining birth rates.|As Offred navigates this oppressive regime, she recalls her past life and searches for ways to maintain her identity and humanity. Through secret alliances and forbidden relationships, she discovers both the depths of human cruelty and the resilience of the spirit, while holding onto the hope of escape and reunion with her lost family.
content: We slept in what had once been the gymnasium...

title: Pride and Prejudice
subtitle: A Novel of Manners
synopsis: The story follows Elizabeth Bennet, a spirited and intelligent young woman, as she navigates the rigid social hierarchy of early 19th-century England. When the wealthy Mr. Darcy arrives in her neighborhood, their initial mutual prejudice and pride prevent them from seeing each other's true nature.|Through a series of events involving her sisters' romances, scandals, and misunderstandings, Elizabeth and Mr. Darcy must overcome their preconceptions and societal pressures. As they learn to look beyond first impressions and class distinctions, they discover that true love can transcend social barriers and personal biases.
content: It is a truth universally acknowledged, that a single man in possession of a good fortune, must be in want of a wife...

title: Brave New World
subtitle: A Vision of a Controlled Society
synopsis: Set in a futuristic World State, humans are genetically engineered and pharmaceutically controlled to maintain social stability. Through mass conditioning and a rigid caste system, the society eliminates individuality and emotional connections in favor of mindless consumption and shallow pleasure.|The story follows Bernard Marx, an Alpha-Plus psychologist who feels like an outsider in this supposedly perfect world, and his discovery of a 'savage' named John who challenges the fundamental principles of their civilization. As John struggles to adapt to this brave new world, his presence triggers a series of events that expose the dark underpinnings of their supposedly utopian society.
content: A squat grey building of only thirty-four stories...

title: To Kill a Mockingbird
subtitle: A Story of Justice and Innocence
synopsis: Through a young girl's eyes, Scout Finch, we witness the unfolding drama of a racially charged trial in 1930s Alabama. When her father, attorney Atticus Finch, defends a black man accused of rape, Scout and her brother Jem must confront the harsh realities of prejudice, injustice, and moral complexity in their small Southern town.|As the trial progresses, Scout learns valuable lessons about human nature, courage, and the importance of standing up for what's right. The children's journey from innocence to understanding is paralleled by their fascination with their mysterious neighbor, Boo Radley, whose story becomes unexpectedly intertwined with their own in a dramatic conclusion that changes their lives forever.
content: When he was nearly thirteen, my brother Jem got his arm badly broken at the elbow...

title: One Hundred Years of Solitude
subtitle: A Saga of the Buendía Family
synopsis: The multi-generational saga follows the Buendía family through the founding and development of Macondo, a mythical Colombian town. From José Arcadio Buendía's obsession with alchemy to the various love affairs, wars, and magical occurrences that shape the family's destiny, the story weaves reality with fantasy in an intricate tapestry of human experience.|Through a century of triumphs, failures, and repeated patterns, the Buendías struggle with their own nature and the weight of their family's fate. As Macondo grows from a utopian settlement to a modern town and ultimately faces its apocalyptic end, the novel explores themes of solitude, love, and the circular nature of time, all while blending the miraculous with the mundane in true magical realist style.
content: Many years later, as he faced the firing squad, Colonel Aureliano Buendía was to remember that distant afternoon when his father took him to discover ice...

title: The Great Gatsby
subtitle: The American Dream Gone Wrong
synopsis: Set in the Roaring Twenties, the story follows Nick Carraway as he becomes entangled in the lavish world of his enigmatic neighbor, Jay Gatsby. Through extravagant parties and mysterious encounters, Nick discovers Gatsby's singular obsession: winning back his long-lost love, Daisy Buchanan, who happens to be Nick's cousin and is married to the wealthy but unfaithful Tom Buchanan.|As Gatsby and Daisy rekindle their romance, the facade of the American Dream begins to crumble, revealing the hollow nature of wealth and social status. Their affair leads to a tragic chain of events that exposes the corruption beneath the glittering surface of the Jazz Age, ultimately culminating in a devastating commentary on the destructive power of wealth, illusion, and unattainable dreams.
content: In my younger and more vulnerable years my father gave me some advice that I've been turning over in my mind ever since...

title: The Alchemist
subtitle: A Mystical Journey of Self-Discovery
synopsis: A young shepherd named Santiago has recurring dreams about finding treasure at the Egyptian pyramids. Following the advice of a mysterious old man who claims to be a king, he sells his flock and embarks on a journey across the Mediterranean and the Sahara desert, encountering various characters who teach him about the universal language of the world and the importance of following one's Personal Legend.|As Santiago continues his spiritual odyssey, he meets an alchemist who becomes his mentor and teaches him about the Soul of the World. Through trials, setbacks, and moments of transformation, Santiago learns that true alchemy lies not in turning lead into gold, but in pursuing one's destiny and understanding that the universe conspires to help those who follow their dreams.
content: The boy's name was Santiago. Dusk was falling as the boy arrived with his herd at an abandoned church...

title: The Catcher in the Rye
subtitle: A Story of Teenage Alienation
synopsis: Sixteen-year-old Holden Caulfield recounts the days following his expulsion from Pencey Prep, a private school. As he navigates through New York City, he encounters various characters and situations that highlight his growing disillusionment with the adult world, which he sees as full of 'phoniness' and superficiality.|Through his wanderings and interactions, Holden reveals his deep desire to protect the innocence of children, particularly his sister Phoebe, from the corruption of adulthood. His mental and emotional struggles intensify as he grapples with questions of identity, authenticity, and the challenging transition from adolescence to adulthood.
content: If you really want to hear about it, the first thing you'll probably want to know is where I was born...

title: The Lord of the Rings
subtitle: The Fellowship of the Ring
synopsis: In ancient Middle-earth, the humble hobbit Frodo Baggins inherits a ring from his uncle Bilbo, only to discover it is the One Ring of Power, forged by the Dark Lord Sauron. With the fate of Middle-earth at stake, Frodo must leave his peaceful life in the Shire and embark on a perilous journey to destroy the ring in the fires of Mount Doom, accompanied by a fellowship of humans, elves, dwarves, and his loyal hobbit friends.|As the fellowship faces increasingly dangerous challenges, they must contend with Sauron's forces, internal conflicts, and the ring's corrupting influence. Their quest becomes a test of friendship, courage, and willpower, while the fate of all free peoples hangs in the balance as darkness threatens to engulf Middle-earth.
content: When Mr. Bilbo Baggins of Bag End announced that he would shortly be celebrating his eleventy-first birthday...

title: Wuthering Heights
subtitle: A Gothic Tale of Passion and Revenge
synopsis: The novel follows the tempestuous relationship between Catherine Earnshaw and Heathcliff, an orphan adopted by Catherine's father. Their deep emotional bond, forged during childhood on the wild Yorkshire moors, becomes increasingly complex as social class and ambition drive Catherine to marry Edgar Linton, a wealthy neighbor, while Heathcliff disappears.|Years later, Heathcliff returns as a wealthy man, seeking revenge on those who separated him from Catherine. His vengeful actions set in motion a chain of events that affects the next generation, including Catherine's daughter and Heathcliff's son, as passion, vengeance, and the supernatural intertwine in this dark tale of obsessive love.
content: I have just returned from a visit to my landlord - the solitary neighbour that I shall be troubled with...

title: Frankenstein
subtitle: The Modern Prometheus
synopsis: In his obsessive pursuit of scientific knowledge, young scientist Victor Frankenstein successfully creates a living being from assembled body parts. However, upon witnessing his creation's hideous appearance, he abandons it in horror, leaving the creature to fend for itself in a world that shows it nothing but fear and hostility.|The creature, intelligent but isolated, seeks revenge on its creator after being rejected by society. As it learns about its own origins and experiences repeated rejection, it embarks on a campaign of vengeance against Frankenstein, leading to a series of tragic events that force both creator and creation to confront questions of responsibility, humanity, and the consequences of unchecked ambition.
content: You will rejoice to hear that no disaster has accompanied the commencement of an enterprise...

title: Coraline and the Secret Door
subtitle: A Tale of Curiosity and Courage
synopsis: Coraline Jones, a young girl bored with her mundane life, discovers a hidden door in her new home that leads to an alternate universe. In this strange world, she meets her 'Other Mother,' who initially seems more attentive and loving than Coraline's real parents. However, as Coraline explores this new reality, she uncovers dark secrets and realizes that the Other Mother has sinister intentions.|Determined to save her real parents and escape the clutches of the Other Mother, Coraline must summon her courage and resourcefulness. With the help of a talking cat and other quirky characters, she embarks on a perilous journey to confront the Other Mother and reclaim her life.
content: In the beginning, Coraline discovers the door that leads to the other world.
